title: Vennheim
description: A small Create focused modpack with fun automations
body:
![Vennheim](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a6b07b5cc83cc8fdb5dc58deb60e6dcf3c5f06d.png)

\
Vennheim is a small modpack aimed to be fun and played with friends! It includes:
- Easy automations for all stonetypes and ores
- Create and AE2! (And ComputerCraft for the more advanced gamers)
- A lot of addons for both Create and AE2 (including Fullblock Energistics and Create: Bitterballen)
- Beautiful terrain by a combi of Terralith and Tectonic

\
If you want to see how make all the different stones and ores, check the [wiki](https://github.com/JJRobot25/Vennheim/wiki)!
